name: Interaction Layer
description: Inject reusable XR interaction systems into the Unity scene.

steps.title: Add XR Rig
steps.description: Install the reusable XR Origin rig and locomotion systems.
instructions: Drag the XR Origin prefab into the scene.
Configure teleport anchors or continuous locomotion.
Verify hand controllers are tracking correctly.

steps.title: Place Hotspot Interactions
steps.description: Add informational hotspots on monument features.
instructions: Drag hotspot prefabs onto points of interest.
Author description text for each hotspot.

steps.title: Validate Interaction Layer
steps.description: Play-test the XR scene and verify interactions work.
instructions: Walk through the scene and trigger each hotspot.
Verify locomotion feels comfortable on target hardware.
